zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tale於1505年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾時，她的父親John MaKernes Mackerness45歲，母親Elizabeth Matthews50歲。她於1526年與Roger Maxwell Sargent在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年10月20日在英國諾薩普頓史爾分頓享年40歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓 哥吉拉 沙智。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tale于1505年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾时，她的父亲John MaKernes Mackerness45岁，母亲Elizabeth Matthews50岁。她于1526年与Roger Maxwell Sargent在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年10月20日在英国諾薩普頓史爾分頓享年40岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓 哥吉拉 沙智。

nameMeanings.name: Tale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

variants.name: Dales
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): variant of Dale , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): nickname for a needy person, from Hebrew dalus ‘poverty’.

variants.name: Dalton
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Diehl
meanings: German: from the personal name Diel, Tiel, from Thilo, a pet form of a personal name beginning with the ancient Germanic element theud ‘people, tribe’, as for example Dietrich . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and the Netherlands. Compare Deal , Deel , and Diel .

variants.name: Deal
meanings: English: habitational name from Deal in Kent, named with Old English dæl ‘(place at) the hollow or valley’.
English: alternatively, a variant of   Dale   1, a topographic name denoting someone who lived in a valley.
Americanized form of German   Diehl   or   Diel  .

variants.name: Dahle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bjorn, Thorvald.  German Rudiger, Hans, Armin, Erwin, Johannes, Juergen.
German: habitational name from any of various places in Germany named Dahle (see   Dahl  ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tale was born in 1505, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John MaKernes Mackerness, was 45 and her mother, Elizabeth Matthews, was 50. She married Roger Maxwell Sargent in 1526, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 20 October 1545, in Finedon, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tale est née en 1505, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John MaKernes Mackerness, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Matthews, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Maxwell Sargent en 1526, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1545, à Finedon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tale 1505 in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John MaKernes Mackerness 45 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Matthews 50. Sie hat 1526 in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Maxwell Sargent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Oktober 1545 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Finedon, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tale è nata il nel 1505 nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John MaKernes Mackerness, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Matthews, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato Roger Maxwell Sargent nel 1526, nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 ottobre 1545, nel Finedon, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Taleが1505年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルで生まれた時，父John MaKernes Mackernessは45歳，母Elizabeth Matthewsは50歳であった。1526年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルでRoger Maxwell Sargentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年10月20日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアフィンエドンで40歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトン アル サインツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tale(이)가 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John MaKernes Mackerness(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Matthews(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 Roger Maxwell Sargent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 10월 20일 영국 노르섬프토실르 핑네던에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴 앨 세인츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tale nasceu em 1505, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John MaKernes Mackerness, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Matthews, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Maxwell Sargent em 1526, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1545, em Finedon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tale родилась в 1505 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John MaKernes Mackerness было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Matthews, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Maxwell Sargent в 1526 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 октября 1545 г. в местности фаинедон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности нортамптон алл сеинц, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tale nació en 1505, en Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John MaKernes Mackerness, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Matthews, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Roger Maxwell Sargent en 1526, en Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1545, en Finedon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
